title: Julia Artifacts.toml
description: Schema for Julia artifact bindings. Each top-level table is an artifact name. See https://pkgdocs.julialang.org/v1/artifacts/.

git-tree-sha1.description: Content hash of the unpacked artifact tree.

lazy.description: When true, the artifact is downloaded on first use rather than package installation.

download.description: One or more download sources for this artifact.

url.description: Download URL for an archive or single-file artifact.

sha256.description: SHA-256 checksum of the downloaded artifact payload.

docs.main: Julia Artifacts.toml schema for vSmartMOM. Reference: [Pkg artifacts](https://pkgdocs.julialang.org/v1/artifacts/).
